metadata.description: Praexo — research, reporting, and advisory plugins for Claude. Built for partners, advisors, and operators who need vertical-grade analysis with consistent brand output.

plugins.name: praexo-research
plugins.description: Deep research and analysis for companies, sectors, value chains, and AI disruption. Six-pass methodology with primary-source bias. Outputs structured markdown notes ready for downstream use.

plugins.name: praexo-report
plugins.description: Praexo-branded Word report generator. Takes research notes and produces 55-65 page or 8-12 page .docx deliverables with full Praexo brand styling.
